scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 3 Most Popular read streams only; the Archive API stream is blocked (ENGINE_GAP — month-window fan-out has no declarative primitive) and stays on the legacy implementation; the full NYTimes surface (Books, Top Stories, Article Search, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: /mostpopular/v2/shared/{period}/{share_type}.json is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/archive/v1/{year}/{month}.json is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
/search/v2/articlesearch.json is a reporting/analytics/query surface with endpoint-specific parameters; this bundle does not declare a stable collection schema and fixture for it

/topstories/v2/{section}.json is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable

/books/v3/lists/current/{list}.json is a detail or scoped sub-resource endpoint requiring caller-supplied identifiers or fan-out beyond this bundle's current spec; the implemented list streams cover the configured collection surface where applicable
